/usr/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/opencv_perf_imgcodecs.dir/objects.a
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc CMakeFiles/opencv_perf_imgcodecs.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/opencv_perf_imgcodecs.dir/objects1.rsp
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++    -fsigned-char -W -Wall -Wreturn-type -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Waddress -Wsequence-point -Wformat -Wformat-security -Wmissing-declarations -Wundef -Winit-self -Wpointer-arith -Wshadow -Wsign-promo -Wuninitialized -Wsuggest-override -Wno-delete-non-virtual-dtor -Wno-comment -Wimplicit-fallthrough=3 -Wno-strict-overflow -fdiagnostics-show-option -fomit-frame-pointer -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections  -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -Wno-deprecated-declarations -O3 -DNDEBUG  -DNDEBUG   -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/opencv_perf_imgcodecs.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o ../../bin/opencv_perf_imgcodecs.exe -Wl,--out-implib,../../bin/libopencv_perf_imgcodecs.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles/opencv_perf_imgcodecs.dir/linklibs.rsp
